profile_backing.source: criterion fj-egraph egraph_baseline benchmark after pass38
profile_backing.hotspot: Safe-mode no-rewrite primitive chains still entered egg even though no safe rewrite rule can match their primitives.
profile_backing.baseline_command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass38-bench-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

one_lever: Bypass egg for safe-mode, single-output, final supported segments whose primitive set cannot match any safe rewrite left-hand side; preserve the existing fresh-variable roundtrip order.

score.confidence_note: After benchmark ran on vmi1149989 rather than the vmi1156319 baseline worker, but the measured target wins are around 9-10x and the golden proof is exact.

after.command: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass39-bench-after rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-egraph --bench egraph_baseline -- --sample-size 20 --measurement-time 2 --warm-up-time 1

isomorphism_proof.ordering_preserved: The fast path walks equations in original segment order and applies the same fresh-var allocation order that the no-rewrite egraph roundtrip used: v1/v2 become v3/v4.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking_unchanged: The bypass only fires when no safe rewrite left-hand side can match, so there is no egraph extraction tie to resolve; output fingerprints are asserted byte-for-byte.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: No operation is removed, added, or algebraically transformed. The exact original primitive sequence is retained with fresh variable IDs, so FP evaluation order is identical.
isomorphism_proof.rng: N/A; optimizer has no RNG inputs or seeds.

validation: RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass39-validate rch exec -- cargo test -p fj-egraph safe_no_rewrite_chain_fast_path_keeps_fresh_var_order -- --nocapture
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass39-check rch exec -- cargo check -p fj-egraph --all-targets
RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-fj-egraph-pass39-clippy rch exec -- cargo clippy -p fj-egraph --all-targets -- -D warnings
